headline: Assessing McKesson (MCK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Perceived Discount
summary: Recent performance context for McKesson With no single headline event driving McKesson (MCK) today, recent share performance and fundamentals provide the key context for investors watching the stock at around $885.84 per share. The recent 1 day share price return of 1.46% and 7 day return of 6.09% sit against a 90 day share price return of 7.28% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 34.57%.
